sys_app.description: Proof-of-concept ServiceNow scoped application that re-platforms a defined subset of ArkCase 2021.03 case-management capabilities onto the ServiceNow Now Platform. Implements seven enumerated POC capabilities: (1) the case lifecycle as the x_casemgmt_case table replicating ArkCase CaseFile fields; (2) the task domain as x_casemgmt_case_task replicating ArkCase AcmTask fields; (3) polymorphic party association as a single x_casemgmt_case_party table that collapses ArkCase PersonAssociation and PersonOrganizationAssociation; (4) three scoped roles (case_manager, case_agent, case_viewer) with table-level and field-level ACLs replacing ArkCase ApplicationRolesToPrivilegesConfig; (5) two Flow Designer flows (one per case type: General Inquiry, Complaint) replacing the Activiti BPMN state machine; (6) an Experience Portal with two unauthenticated pages (case submission and case status lookup); and (7) two Performance Analytics dashboards (Agent Workspace and Manager View). All artifacts live in the auto-assigned x_casemgmt namespace; zero global-scope writes are made. No external integrations, no email notifications, no document management, and no data migration from ArkCase are performed.
sys_app.name: x_casemgmt Case Management
sys_app.short_description: Proof-of-concept ServiceNow re-platforming of ArkCase case-management capabilities.
